name_en: [Chip Version] Model M46197 Introducing the new CarryAll medium handbag, featuring a Monogram canvas and leather trim for a flattering silhouette. Equipped with a zip pocket for ample storage, a detachable zip pouch for added functionality, and an adjustable handle length.
